recipes.name: Priority Well
recipes.intent: make important elements feel naturally weighted without shouting

accessibility.reducedMotion: weight, glow, and the current-state marker hold their last value — no travel
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the important element is also stronger in weight, outline, and reading order

recipes.notes: Gravity + attract pull matter and attention into one well; --field-attention / --field-priority write back to drive weight and bloom. (The density lane is host-supplied — set data-field-density to ground --field-density; the engine's own live density channel is --d on data-feedback bodies.)

recipes.name: Focus Orbit
recipes.intent: keep related options moving around the active item

accessibility.reducedMotion: a static relationship ring marks the active item; related items keep their weighted emphasis
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the active item is marked current; related items are listed beside it

recipes.notes: The active item is a gravity well; magnetism curves the surrounding motion around it (gravity + electromagnetic), and tether keeps related options nearby.

recipes.name: Search Relevance Field
recipes.intent: let search results settle by relevance, confidence, and recency

accessibility.reducedMotion: results re-rank into a static ordered list; memory shows as a "seen" tick
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: ranking is a numbered list; relevance and recency are labelled

recipes.notes: Relevance becomes attract strength so confident results sink into deeper wells; weak results drift out (repel); previously opened results retain memory.

recipes.name: Signal Path
recipes.intent: show information flowing through citations, dependencies, or routes

accessibility.reducedMotion: a persistent path line with step markers replaces the travelling signal
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the route is also an ordered list of steps with a current-step state

recipes.notes: A signal travels source → target along declared relationships: charge sets polarity, propagate carries the wave, fieldflow carries matter along the structure. Electric pushes, magnetic bends, fieldflow carries.

recipes.name: Evidence Field
recipes.intent: show how sources support, weaken, or contradict a claim

accessibility.reducedMotion: a static claim/source table with support and conflict badges
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each source is listed as supporting or contradicting, with a confidence label

recipes.notes: Claims are bodies; supporting sources bind them (link + cohesion), contradictory sources repel and raise entropy (electromagnetic + strong). Strong evidence increases coherence.

recipes.name: Conflict Field
recipes.intent: make contradiction, uncertainty, and unstable state visible

accessibility.reducedMotion: a static conflict rail lists contradictions and the fields they affect
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each contradiction is named with the states in conflict

recipes.notes: Opposing states repel and raise entropy (electromagnetic); morph carries the transformation pressure toward resolution or a decayed warning (weak).

recipes.name: Relationship Bond
recipes.intent: keep related elements visually and behaviorally connected

accessibility.reducedMotion: a static connector and a paired highlight stand in for the live bond
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: related elements share a label/color and are listed as connected

recipes.notes: Related elements hold together through a bond with strength, tension, and memory — the strong force: binding and local structure.

recipes.name: Concept Cluster
recipes.intent: group related terms, cards, or sections without hard layout changes

accessibility.reducedMotion: concepts collapse into grouped lists; active groups keep emphasis
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: related concepts are grouped under headings with relation badges

recipes.notes: Related concepts cluster without a rigid layout (cohesion + crystallize); active concepts strengthen nearby terms; unrelated ones cool and drift.

recipes.name: Coherence Field
recipes.intent: show whether a form, workflow, or dataset is becoming stable

accessibility.reducedMotion: a static coherence/progress rail marks stable and unstable sections
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: validity is announced and shown with icon + text per field

recipes.notes: As valid pieces align, the field becomes more coherent (strong binding); missing or contradictory pieces raise pressure and entropy.

recipes.name: Reading Field
recipes.intent: make long content pages reveal attention, memory, and concept links

accessibility.reducedMotion: a memory-weighted table of contents and static section rails replace the live trail
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: progress is a read-state marker; citations are listed inline

recipes.notes: Sections near the viewport centre gain attention (gravity); dwelled sections accumulate memory; related concepts and citations light up through relationships. The flagship /docs/reading-field demo runs this on the production platform runtime.

recipes.name: Memory Trace
recipes.intent: show where a user has been, paused, returned, or accumulated attention

accessibility.reducedMotion: static history marks and recency labels replace the decaying trail
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: visited items are marked with a timestamp / recency label

recipes.notes: Interaction leaves a decaying trace (weak-force decay via memory); repeated interaction strengthens it; inactive traces cool over time.

recipes.name: Decay Notice
recipes.intent: let stale, temporary, or completed state fade gracefully

accessibility.reducedMotion: a timestamp and a faded state marker replace the decay animation
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the state stays announced as text while emphasis fades

recipes.notes: A state begins strong then naturally releases (weak force: expiration); the element stays semantically clear while visual emphasis decays.

recipes.name: Phase Shift
recipes.intent: show a state transition: draft → published, pending → complete, hidden → active

accessibility.reducedMotion: a state label and progress marker replace the transition; non-motion styling shows the change
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the from/to state is named and announced on change

recipes.notes: A body transitions between named states (weak-force transformation via morph); the interface shows continuity rather than replacement.

recipes.name: Guided Flow
recipes.intent: move particles or attention along field lines, relationships, or paths

accessibility.reducedMotion: a static path contour with a numbered route and direction markers
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the route is an ordered list of steps with direction labels

recipes.notes: Matter and attention move along field lines / relationship paths (electromagnetic + transport). Magnetism bends, fieldflow carries — the recipe-level expression of field.flowTo() and fieldflow.

recipes.name: Diagnostic Lens
recipes.intent: reveal field lines, causality, prediction, topology, energy, and overlays

accessibility.reducedMotion: a static inspector table and overlay toggles replace the live overlays
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: every overlay has a textual table equivalent (counts, contributions, energy)

recipes.notes: The lens reveals why something moved, where energy accumulated, which relationships are active, and which primitive caused the result. It reads diagnostics over any field rather than adding force.

recipes.name: Accessibility Equivalence
recipes.intent: convert motion-heavy behavior into static, semantic, reduced-motion equivalents

accessibility.reducedMotion: this recipe defines the equivalent: motion-heavy behavior maps to a static, semantic, reduced-motion form
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: field visuals clarify state but are never the only source of meaning — semantics carry it

recipes.notes: The contract recipe: any motion-heavy behavior must map to a semantic, static, reduced-motion equivalent. No field behavior may be the only source of meaning.

recipes.name: Attention Weather
recipes.intent: show system urgency, density, and activity across a dashboard

accessibility.reducedMotion: a status rail with a pressure badge per section and a priority-ordered list
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: section tone, a numeric pressure badge, and priority ordering carry urgency without animation

recipes.notes: Mass falls toward what matters and heat rises where the system runs hot — gravitational priority and thermal weather translated to a dashboard.

recipes.name: Navigation Current
recipes.intent: make routes, breadcrumbs, and likely next paths feel connected

accessibility.reducedMotion: an active-path rail with visited markers and next-step hints
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the route reads as an ordered breadcrumb list with visited and next-step labels

recipes.notes: Magnetism bends the route, fieldflow carries the traveller along it — the active path emits a current while prior routes linger as memory.

recipes.name: Citation Thread
recipes.intent: bind citations, footnotes, evidence, references into visible relationships

accessibility.reducedMotion: persistent source highlights with numbered source links and support badges
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each claim names its source via a numbered link and a support badge, no thread animation needed

recipes.notes: Charge binds a citation to its source and fieldflow carries the eye down the thread — electromagnetic relation made readable from either end.

recipes.name: Form Stability Field
recipes.intent: show validation as coherence instead of error noise

accessibility.reducedMotion: a coherence meter with grouped validation messages and stable/unstable markers
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: a coherence meter and per-group stable/unstable markers report validity without motion

recipes.notes: The strong force binds valid fields into one coherent body while contradiction raises pressure — weak-style decay (morph) releases the tension as completion settles in.

recipes.name: Command Intent Field
recipes.intent: let command palettes settle around likely intent

accessibility.reducedMotion: ranked command groups with risk labels and recency indicators
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: commands appear as a ranked list with risk labels and recency badges, no settling animation required

recipes.notes: Likely commands sink into a gravity well while dangerous ones repel — electromagnetic charge clusters the related, gravity decides what rises to the top.

recipes.name: Selection Wake
recipes.intent: leave a subtle trail of user interaction and selection

accessibility.reducedMotion: selection-history marks with recent-item badges and a static trail rail
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: a static history rail lists recently touched items with recency badges in place of a fading wake

recipes.notes: Memory holds the wake while diffuse lets it fade, and fieldflow carries repeated paths into usage trails — transport that remembers where attention has been.

recipes.name: Availability Pressure
recipes.intent: show schedule density, conflicts, and open space

accessibility.reducedMotion: density shading with conflict badges and open-space markers
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: busy and open blocks read through density shading, conflict badges, and explicit open-space markers

recipes.notes: Deadlines sink into gravitational wells and busy blocks raise pressure, while elastic events ride a tether (spring) — schedule density read as a gravity-and-pressure landscape.

recipes.name: Dependency Tension
recipes.intent: reveal constraints, blockers, and coupled states

accessibility.reducedMotion: a dependency table with a blocker count and tension badges
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: dependencies and blockers read as a table with a blocker count and per-edge tension badges

recipes.notes: The strong force binds coupled items through tether (spring) tension while electromagnetic charge pulls conflicting paths apart — blocked links heat, resolved ones cool.

recipes.name: Staleness Drift
recipes.intent: make outdated content, data, or files cool and recede

accessibility.reducedMotion: stale badges with an aging tone and a last-verified marker
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: staleness reads through stale badges, aging tone, and an explicit last-verified date

recipes.notes: Like a weak-force decay, unattended items morph and diffuse toward the background while memory lets a revisit pull them back into coherence.

recipes.name: Trust Gradient
recipes.intent: show confidence, verification, and unsupported claims

accessibility.reducedMotion: trust badges with an evidence table and an unsupported-claim list
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: trust reads through per-claim badges, a supporting-evidence table, and a flagged unsupported-claim list

recipes.notes: Electromagnetic charge pulls verified claims into coherence and separates contradictions, while links to sources set the trust gradient — evidence is the field, confidence the potential.

recipes.name: Completion Release
recipes.intent: let finished work release pressure and settle into memory

accessibility.reducedMotion: a completion marker with a resolved-state badge and a stable history line
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: finished work reads as a resolved-state badge plus a stable history-line entry rather than vanishing

recipes.notes: Active work holds pressure under gravity; completion is a weak-force phase change (morph) that releases the tension and leaves a memory mark instead of disappearing.

recipes.name: Group Magnet
recipes.intent: let related cards, assets, or controls cluster intelligently

accessibility.reducedMotion: grouped sections with relation badges and cluster headings
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: clusters read as labeled grouped sections with relation badges, no magnetic motion required

recipes.notes: The strong force binds related items into one cluster around a representative center while gravity sets the local hub — crystallize snaps stragglers onto the lattice.

recipes.name: Error Pressure
recipes.intent: show accumulated instability without harsh alert patterns

accessibility.reducedMotion: an error summary with heat badges and an affected-section rail
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: errors read through a summary count, per-section heat badges, and an affected-section rail

recipes.notes: Errors add thermal heat and entropy that accumulate as pressure; resolved ones cool and, like a weak decay, morph into history instead of flashing an alarm.

recipes.name: Handoff Stream
recipes.intent: show ownership or state moving from one person or system to another

accessibility.reducedMotion: a transfer timeline with owner badges and a handoff log
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the transfer reads as a timeline of owner badges plus a handoff log entry, not a flowing animation

recipes.notes: Magnetism bends the path between owners and fieldflow carries the object along it — the source cools, the target warms, and a memory trace records the transfer.

recipes.name: Context Halo
recipes.intent: reveal nearby relevant context around a focused element

accessibility.reducedMotion: a context panel with a related-links list and local callouts
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: related context reads as a panel of ordered related links and callouts ranked by relation strength

recipes.notes: A focused element becomes a gravity well that draws nearby definitions, examples, and prior interactions inward — relevance ranked by relation strength, not fixed placement.

recipes.name: Field Tutorial
recipes.intent: teach field-ui by revealing DOM, bodies, fields, metrics, feedback, and overlays

accessibility.reducedMotion: a stepper with static diagrams and live code snippets at each stage
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each stage is a labeled step with a static diagram and the exact code, so the lesson reads fully without animation

recipes.notes: A narrative diagnostic recipe: a single attract body gives the inspector something real to read while the interface reveals itself stage by stage — DOM, bodies, fields, metrics, feedback, overlays, reduced-motion.

recipes.name: Semantic Gravity Map
recipes.intent: let a document or app reveal which concepts carry the most weight

accessibility.reducedMotion: a weighted concept index with an importance rail and a section density map
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: mass becomes a sorted importance ranking with explicit weight values per concept

recipes.notes: Gravity pulls heavy concepts to the center while link and cohesion bind related ones; importance is mass, memory keeps recurrence felt over time.

recipes.name: Polarity Filter
recipes.intent: let opposing states, tags, or preferences sort themselves visibly

accessibility.reducedMotion: grouped filter lanes with signed badges and separate match and conflict sections
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: polarity reads as a signed badge and items live in labeled match or conflict groups

recipes.notes: Electric pushes and pulls by sign: matching charge attracts toward the active filter, opposing charge repels, and diffuse keeps neutral items quietly stable.

recipes.name: Source Constellation
recipes.intent: show how multiple sources gather around claims, topics, or decisions

accessibility.reducedMotion: a claim and source matrix with a source ranking and labeled support clusters
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: support becomes a ranked matrix where distance is a number and contradiction is a marked row

recipes.notes: Strong binding holds sources to the claims they support while electric charge lets contradictory sources carry the opposite sign; repeatedly cited sources gain mass and memory.

recipes.name: Drift Correction
recipes.intent: bring wandering attention or unstable layout back into coherence

accessibility.reducedMotion: a snap guide with a restore marker and a stable-state outline
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: drift reads as a labeled distance from the stable state with a one-step restore control

recipes.notes: A weak corrective pull is the gentle counterpart to gravity: tether (spring) remembers the stable relation and morph eases the return so wandering settles without snapping.

recipes.name: Resonance Match
recipes.intent: highlight elements that ring with the user current intent

accessibility.reducedMotion: a related-item list with resonance badges and ranked suggestions
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: resonance becomes a ranked list of matches with explicit strength badges rather than a glow

recipes.notes: Electric charge lets elements ring with shared terms while memory carries history and propagate spreads the match; resonance shows as coherence, not noise.

recipes.name: Friction Gate
recipes.intent: slow risky, destructive, or irreversible actions without modal noise

accessibility.reducedMotion: a confirmation rail moving from a disabled to a ready state with an explicit risk summary
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: friction becomes a readiness meter and the action stays disabled until an explicit risk summary is acknowledged

recipes.notes: Derived from drag: viscosity makes risky motion deliberate, gate holds release until coherence builds, and morph marks the disabled-to-ready transition without a disruptive modal.

recipes.name: Boundary Field
recipes.intent: make safe zones, drop zones, scopes, and containers perceptible

accessibility.reducedMotion: a boundary outline with valid and invalid zone labels and a static drop affordance
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the container shows a drawn outline and each item is labeled valid or invalid for that zone

recipes.notes: Strong containment gives containers an edge: wall reflects invalid objects, sink absorbs valid ones into the scope, and cohesion makes the boundary visible as you approach; electric repel screens what does not belong.

recipes.name: Threshold Bloom
recipes.intent: reveal meaningful state changes only when a threshold is crossed

accessibility.reducedMotion: a threshold marker with a status badge and an event log entry
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: crossing the threshold flips a status badge and writes a dated event log entry instead of a bloom

recipes.notes: A weak event waits quietly until the gate opens, then morph and spawn bloom the transition while charge marks the moment; memory keeps the event inspectable after it settles.

recipes.name: Latency Ripple
recipes.intent: show delay, loading, sync, and distributed system response as waves

accessibility.reducedMotion: a sync timeline with an affected-region list and latency badges
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: delay becomes a per-region latency badge and a timeline rather than a traveling wave

recipes.notes: A signal propagates outward and fieldflow carries it to affected regions; diffuse damps slow or blocked areas so delay reads as distance, not a spinner.

recipes.name: Provenance Trail
recipes.intent: preserve the origin and transformation history of content or data

accessibility.reducedMotion: a provenance drawer with a lineage list and source badges
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: history becomes an ordered lineage list with source badges and a transform count per step

recipes.notes: Strong binding keeps sources fused to content while memory holds the trace and morph records each transformation; lineage stays inspectable without flooding the view.

recipes.name: Review Pressure
recipes.intent: surface items needing review before they decay, expire, or block work

accessibility.reducedMotion: a review queue ranking with urgency badges and age markers
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: pressure becomes a sorted review queue where age and risk are explicit badges per item

recipes.notes: Items build gravitational priority as the weak pull of age and pressure accumulates; thermal stands in for rising entropy so high-risk or blocked work surfaces on its own while low-risk stays calm.

recipes.name: Semantic Snap
recipes.intent: align objects, cards, or text fragments by meaning instead of only geometry

accessibility.reducedMotion: snap guides with semantic alignment labels and relation hints
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: snapping becomes labeled alignment guides naming the relationship that pulled two items together

recipes.notes: Strong relational binding lets objects snap by meaning: link and tether (spring) draw matching tags or dependent blocks together while crystallize locks them into a clean semantic alignment.

recipes.name: Ambient Tutor
recipes.intent: teach the interface quietly based on hesitation, return, and attention

accessibility.reducedMotion: contextual tips with a help rail and related-explanation markers
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: help surfaces as a contextual tip near the point of need with a list of related explanations

recipes.notes: Memory watches hesitation and repeated returns while gravity gives the right explanation subtle priority near the point of need; propagate and link carry help to related controls.

recipes.name: Relation Lens
recipes.intent: temporarily reveal hidden connections without changing layout

accessibility.reducedMotion: a relation list with numbered connectors and a static map
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: connections become a numbered list pairing each element with what it relates to, layout unchanged

recipes.notes: Strong relational binding lets the lens light up link bonds among visible elements; memory and cohesion hold the revealed map steady so definitions, citations, and dependencies show without moving anything.

recipes.name: Priority Tide
recipes.intent: let importance rise and fall over time, workload, or context

accessibility.reducedMotion: a priority ordering with aging badges and a deadline rail
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: tidal importance becomes a re-sortable ranked list with explicit age and deadline values

recipes.notes: Gravity sets importance while the weak pulls of age and deadline make it tidal: morph and diffuse let priority rise and ebb so nothing stays permanently loud, and memory keeps the decay honest.

recipes.name: Field Contract Preview
recipes.intent: show exactly what a recipe will register, measure, write, and render before enabling it

accessibility.reducedMotion: a static contract table listing what the recipe registers, measures, writes, and renders
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the preview is a plain table of registrations, measurements, writes, and announcements with no motion at all

recipes.notes: A platform diagnostic, not a force: it reads the registries and lintPlatform to make field behavior auditable before enabling, with one minimal sample body so the contract itself stays inspectable.

recipes.name: Presence Field
recipes.intent: show collaborators as live influence, not static avatars

accessibility.reducedMotion: a collaborator rail with recent-edit marks and static presence badges
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each collaborator is a labelled badge with a recency timestamp and the object they are near

recipes.notes: Each focused collaborator is a charge emitting signal; propagate carries it, fieldflow draws presence toward shared objects, and recent edits cool into memory. Electric pushes, magnetic bends, fieldflow carries.

recipes.name: Consensus Well
recipes.intent: let agreement gather around stable options or decisions

accessibility.reducedMotion: a support matrix with an agreement meter and dissent markers
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each option shows a numeric support count, a coherence label, and listed dissenting arguments

recipes.notes: Options that gather agreement gain mass and pull arguments into a single well; cohesion binds the supporters while pressure exposes fragile, contested consensus instead of false certainty (gravity gathering mass, the strong bind holding it).

recipes.name: Disagreement Charge
recipes.intent: make unresolved conflict visible without turning it into noise

accessibility.reducedMotion: conflict pairs with a resolution-state column and a disagreement summary
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each conflict is a labelled pair of claims with a resolved/open state and an entropy score

recipes.notes: Opposing claims carry like charge and repel into visible separation, thermal entropy marking heated conflict; once resolved, the claim morphs and decays into memory rather than alarming. Electric pushes, magnetic bends.

recipes.name: Change Shockwave
recipes.intent: show the downstream impact of a change across a system

accessibility.reducedMotion: an impact tree with an affected-item list and downstream badges
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each affected item is listed by dependency distance with a risk badge, ordered by impact

recipes.notes: A change emits a wave that propagates along links: immediate dependencies light first, distant ones respond damped and late, and critical downstream effects raise pressure (propagation carries the wavefront; the weak interaction lets items morph).

recipes.name: Permission Boundary
recipes.intent: make access, scope, and protected regions legible

accessibility.reducedMotion: access labels with protected-region outlines and a permission summary
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each region is an outlined zone with an access label and a per-actor allow/deny list

recipes.notes: Protected regions hold like walls: authorized actors pass cleanly while unauthorized or risky ones meet resistance and are absorbed (sink) at the boundary. The strong bind confines scope; charge gives each actor its polarity.

recipes.name: Risk Horizon
recipes.intent: reveal approaching risk before it becomes an error

accessibility.reducedMotion: a risk-horizon line with threshold markers and an affected-region list
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: risk is a labelled threshold line; affected regions are listed with their distance to it

recipes.notes: Risk forms a horizon that pulls like gravity: as it rises, affected elements gain pressure, draw attention, and drift toward the threshold, diffusing the warning outward before any error lands (the weak interaction lets the state morph as it crosses).

recipes.name: Intent Magnet
recipes.intent: pull likely actions toward the user's current context

accessibility.reducedMotion: a suggested-actions list with a next-step badge and contextual shortcuts
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: likely actions are ranked in a list by confidence, each labelled with why it was suggested

recipes.notes: Current focus, history, and task state become a gentle gravity center that draws likely next actions closer; memory weights what worked before while cohesion keeps related actions together, assisting without taking control.

recipes.name: Flow Checkpoint
recipes.intent: stabilize multi-step flows around milestones

accessibility.reducedMotion: a stepper with a checkpoint rail and completed-step markers
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the flow is an ordered stepper; completed milestones are marked and anchor the remaining steps

recipes.notes: Multi-step flows form a current that fieldflow carries forward, but checkpoints bind like strong anchors: completed milestones hold structure with cohesion while progress keeps streaming ahead (the strong bind stabilizes, transport carries).

recipes.name: Version Gravity
recipes.intent: show which version, branch, or draft is becoming canonical

accessibility.reducedMotion: a version tree with a canonical badge and a fork list
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: versions form a tree; the canonical one carries a badge and a weight, forks list their distance from it

recipes.notes: Versions gain and lose mass by recency, approval, references, and edits, so the canonical draft becomes a gravity center pulling the rest while forks stay visible as related bodies that may morph toward it.

recipes.name: Review Constellation
recipes.intent: bind reviewers, comments, issues, and artifacts into one field

accessibility.reducedMotion: a reviewer matrix with issue clusters and an unresolved-count rail
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: reviewers, comments, issues, and artifacts form a labelled matrix with an unresolved count per cluster

recipes.notes: Reviewers, comments, issues, and artifacts bind into one constellation: open issues hold tension, resolved comments cool into memory, and a reviewer in focus emits current to the artifact (the strong bind holds it, charge marks active focus).

recipes.name: Anomaly Bloom
recipes.intent: surface unusual behavior as local heat and instability

accessibility.reducedMotion: anomaly badges with an affected-region list and a severity gradient
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: each anomaly is a labelled badge with a severity value and the region it affects, ranked by heat

recipes.notes: Anomalies bloom locally as thermal heat that diffuses outward; they never auto-alarm, instead letting heat, pressure, and spread reveal whether the event is isolated, growing, or cooling into memory (the weak interaction is the local instability that lets behavior morph).

recipes.name: Scope Lens
recipes.intent: reveal what a component, recipe, or action can affect

accessibility.reducedMotion: an affected-item table with an impact list and a scope outline
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: activating the lens lists every item an action can affect in a table, each with a relation strength

recipes.notes: A diagnostic overlay, not a field of its own: links trace what an action can reach, walls mark where its scope stops, and the lens focuses the view on reach before mutation. It reads the relationship graph rather than translating a natural field.

recipes.name: Calibration Field
recipes.intent: help users tune settings toward a stable target

accessibility.reducedMotion: a target meter with a stability marker and a recommended range
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the target is a labelled meter; current config shows its distance and whether it sits in the recommended range

recipes.notes: A target state sits as a stable gravity well: as the user tunes, the current config moves toward or away from coherence, and over-tuned or contradictory settings add pressure that pushes it back out.

recipes.name: Semantic Drag
recipes.intent: add resistance when movement would break meaning

accessibility.reducedMotion: valid/invalid guides with relation warnings and a drop-cost marker
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: valid drop targets are listed; invalid moves show a warning and a labelled cost before commit

recipes.notes: A derived friction recipe, not a natural field: dragging an object away from meaningful neighbors thickens viscosity while tether (spring) and links resist, and moving toward a valid relationship lets resistance fall away. The user can always override.

recipes.name: Recovery Path
recipes.intent: guide users back from error, drift, or interrupted state

accessibility.reducedMotion: a recovery checklist with a last-good-state marker and a restore path
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: the last coherent state is marked and recovery is an ordered checklist back to it, not a generic error screen

recipes.notes: When a process fails or interrupts, memory holds the last coherent path while gravity pulls the user back toward it and fieldflow carries them along the guided return, morphing the broken state back into a stable one.

recipes.name: System Pulse
recipes.intent: show the living rhythm of a product, workflow, or data system

accessibility.reducedMotion: a health rail with a pulse timestamp and a static system-status indicator
accessibility.meaningWithoutMotion: system health is a labelled status indicator with a last-pulse timestamp and a sync state

recipes.notes: The system emits a low-frequency pulse that propagates as an ambient heartbeat, thermal heat reflecting live activity while cohesion reads sync and memory holds the trend, the emitter (spawn) issuing each beat without distracting from content.
